title: TTRP Tamer's Models and Fixes
description: TTRP Models that Tamer has made for the public including fixes and changes to items
body:
[The resource pack has DynamicPack support.](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamicpack)
The texture adds weapons, hats, and more. These Texture are generally used for a server named TTRP, a dnd inspired minecraft server. This texture pack allows users to create and show off their amazing weapons, items, or unique items. Please make sure to join my discord for requests and commission work: [Tamer's Models and Fixes](https://discord.gg/Yv3DBmHTr3)
